summary: Frontend-only testing of justaleks.no static React portfolio. All 44 checks passed across desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (375x812) viewports. Navbar, Hero, Work, Gallery, About, Skills, Contact form (empty + filled), Footer, and mobile drawer all functional with correct data-testids. No console errors. No broken images. Contact form opens mailto and shows success/error toasts as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: Static-site approach is clean; Contact.jsx mailto fallback is acceptable for GitHub Pages, but consider Formspree/Resend for production submission tracking.
BrowserRouter is used with a single '/' route; for GitHub Pages, switch to HashRouter or configure 404.html fallback to avoid refresh-404 on subpaths in future.
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes — excellent testability.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Site is fully static. Contact form uses window.location.href = 'mailto:...' — playwright may print 'Refused to navigate to mailto:' but this is expected, not a failure. Toast appears ~600ms after submission with text 'Mail client opened. Tusen takk!'. All required testids verified present.
